description: Create comprehensive production-grade documentation in docs/ directory: architecture.md (full system architecture with mermaid diagrams), deployment.md (local/Docker/K8s guide), api-reference.md (all backend endpoints), development.md (dev setup + contributing), security.md (security architecture + threat model), runbook.md (operational procedures). Also add README.md to each new Wave 5-6 package. Update root README.md with architecture diagram, quick start, badges, and links.
steps: Create docs/architecture.md - Full system architecture with mermaid diagrams showing: app layer (16 apps), package layer (key packages), service layer (8 services), data layer (Postgres, Redis, Kafka, Meilisearch, Qdrant). Show data flow between layers.

Create docs/deployment.md - Step-by-step for: local dev (pnpm install, docker compose, dev commands), Docker deployment (docker-compose.yml explained, env vars), Kubernetes (Helm chart in infra/, values, secrets, ingress)

Create docs/api-reference.md - Document all API routes across apps: admin API routes (stats, users, services, notifications, search, apps, audit, compliance, feature-flags, health), quantmail (emails, threads, contacts, calendar, drive, labels, repos, ci), quantchat, quantsync, etc. Group by app with method, path, description, auth requirement.
Create docs/development.md - Prerequisites, setup steps, project structure, code conventions (TypeScript strict, Vitest tests, eslint), PR workflow, adding a new package guide, adding a new app guide

Create docs/security.md - Security architecture overview, auth flow (QuantMail OAuth2), encryption at rest/transit, CSRF protection, rate limiting, session management, API key management, IP reputation, threat model summary, incident response playbook

Create docs/runbook.md - Operational procedures: health checks, log aggregation (OpenTelemetry), alert escalation, common issues and fixes, scaling procedures, database maintenance, Redis cluster ops, Kafka consumer lag, deployment rollback
Add README.md to packages/data-pipeline/, packages/edge-config/, packages/security-advanced/ with: purpose, installation, API usage examples, configuration
Update root README.md with: project badges section, updated architecture mermaid diagram, 3-command quick start, links to all docs, updated package/app counts
acceptance_criteria: docs/architecture.md exists with valid mermaid diagram syntax
docs/api-reference.md covers admin, quantmail, and other app routes
docs/development.md has setup instructions matching actual project
docs/security.md covers the actual security implementations in the codebase
Each new package has a README.md
Root README.md links to docs/ and has current counts
verification: Verify all docs files exist and are non-empty markdown
Verify mermaid diagrams have correct syntax (```mermaid blocks)
Verify README.md references are accurate to actual project structure
findings: All 10 documentation files created. Prettier reformatted markdown during lint-staged pre-commit hook. Mermaid diagrams validated with correct syntax (graph TD, sequenceDiagram). All docs reference actual file paths, packages, API routes from the codebase. No build/test needed for docs-only change.
